content:
# Session 6 — review of iter-006

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (SNAP-S0 graded-section residue).
- **Sorry count: 9 → 3.** Cold build `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` exit 0
  (2439 jobs). Closed chain axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (NO `sorryAx`).
- First prover lane since iter-001 (iters 002–005 idled no-prover). Triggered by user hint
  "start proving now"; planner activated SNAP-S0.
- 41 edits, 12 transient errors, 17 lemma searches, 8 clean diagnostics.

## Solved (6 of 9 assigned + foundations)
- **`sectionsCast`** — `((toPresheafOfModules X ⋙ evaluation (op ⊤)).mapIso (eqToIso (congrArg (tensorPow L) h))).toLinearEquiv`. Typechecks directly.
- **`sectionsCast_refl`** — `by ext x; rfl`. (First tried `simp only [...congrArg_refl...]` → `Unknown identifier congrArg_refl`; the mapIso of `eqToIso rfl` is pure defeq.)
- **`gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`** — `obtain ⟨i,x⟩;⟨j,y⟩; obtain rfl := h; simp only [sectionsCast_refl, LinearEquiv.refl_apply] at h2; subst h2; rfl`.
- **`instGMulNatSectionDeg`** (GMul) — `Γ(μ_{i,j}) ∘ sectionsMul` on `a⊗ₜb`. **Key:** the `⊗ₜ` ring annotation must be `(X.sheaf.obj ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat).obj (op ⊤)`, NOT `↥(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (op ⊤))` — first attempt failed `failed to synthesize CommSemiring`.
- **`instGOneNatSectionDeg`** (GOne) — `one := (1 : ↥(X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (op ⊤)))`; defeq-accepted since `tensorPow L 0 = unitModule X` and degree-0 carrier is the ring; `gOne_one_eq := rfl` witnesses it.
- **`sectionsMul_one_mul`** (left-unitality, 1 of 4 coherence laws) — axiom-clean. Route: `gMul_mul_apply, gOne_one_eq` → expose `Γ(μ_{0,n}) ∘ sectionsMul`; `tensorPowAdd L 0 n` is base-case `tensorObjUnitIso ≪≫ eqToIso` (rfl); inner `eqToIso` cancels the outer `sectionsCast (zero_add n)` via `sectionsCast_sectionsCast`; core `tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul` finishes. **Decisive idiom (see KB):** `rw` of `unit_naturality_assoc`/`right_triangle_components` FAILS on the `𝟙_` vs `(toP).obj unitModule` and `.val` vs `(forget⋙restrictScalars).map` syntactic gaps — `erw` (defeq) succeeds for these morphism-level rewrites. ModuleCat left-unitor on `1⊗ₜa` is defeq `1•a` (`change … • a = a; rw [one_smul]`).

## Partial (3 open sorries, all reduced + structured — NOT bare)
- **`tensorPowAdd_zero_right`** (NEW extracted standalone lemma, `tensorPowAdd L n 0 = tensorObjRightUnitor (tensorPow L n)`, by `induction n`): **base `n=0` CLOSED** (`Subsingleton.elim`→drop reflexive `eqToIso`→`congr 2; apply Iso.ext; exact MonoidalCategory.unitors_equal`). **`succ` step `sorry`** (L2031): the sheaf-level **triangle identity** in `tensorObjAssoc`/`tensorBraiding`/right-unitor; Mathlib `coherence` tactic does NOT apply (bespoke `sheafification`-defined isos, no registered `MonoidalCategory` instance). `sectionsMul_mul_one`'s own body is sorry-free and closes the moment this lands.
- **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** (L2091) — `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]`; gap = associativity constraint of `tensorPowAdd` (pentagon analog) + `sectionsMul` naturality. Associativity induction mirroring `tensorPowAdd` recursion.
- **`sectionsMul_mul_comm`** (L2107) — `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]`; gap = commutativity constraint (`μ_{na,nb}` vs `μ_{nb,na}` after `tensorBraiding`) + `sectionsMul` symmetry.

## 7 new private helper lemmas added (all compile; coverage debt, see recommendations)
`gMul_mul_apply`, `gOne_one_eq`, `sectionsCast_apply` (all `:= rfl` unfold handles),
`sectionsCast_sectionsCast`, `sectionsCast_self` (transport cancellation),
`tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`, `tensorObjRightUnitor_hom_sectionsMul` (the core unit-coherence
identities — the proven template for the remaining coherence inductions). Plus the extracted
`tensorPowAdd_zero_right`. None have blueprint blocks yet.

## Verification subagents
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** (`task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-sgr-iter006.md`): Lean faithfully formalizes every blueprint block; signatures + index-cast convention + all `\lean{}` hints (incl. the auto-named instances) match. 0 must-fix. Confirmed `instGMul/GOne` `\lean{}` hints resolve and are axiom-clean. Open sorries honestly tracked (their bundled block carries no `\leanok`).
- **lean-auditor** (`task_results/lean-auditor-iter006.md`): 4 must-fix / 2 major / 4 minor. The 3 explicit sorries confirmed **genuinely open** (no silent axiom/`Classical.choice`/tautological-`rfl` discharge). Closed proofs honest. 4th must-fix = `sectionsMul_mul_one` transitive-sorry-contamination (closed body but gated on `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` succ → only proved for `n=0`); this is honestly tracked (no `\leanok` on its block) so it is NOT laundering, but downstream assembly must not treat it as closed. **Major (actionable):** `tensorObjAssoc` (L1610) builds the associator via a double-braiding detour — valid type but possibly non-canonical vs Mac Lane; flagged as a plausible root cause for why the assoc/triangle sorries are hard.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `def:sectionGradedGMul`: added `\leanok` (manual override). `sync_leanok` (iter=6, sha 77eee11, +10) missed it because the `\lean{}` target `instGMulNatSectionDeg` is an **anonymous `instance`** auto-generated name; `lean_verify` confirms it resolves and is axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, NO sorry.
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `def:sectionGradedGOne`: added `\leanok` (manual override, same reason — `instGOneNatSectionDeg` verified axiom-clean).
- No change to `lem:sectionMul_coherent` (correctly unmarked — 3 of its 4 `\lean{}` targets carry `sorryAx`).

## Notes (LOW)
- `erw` ×2 in the unit-iso helpers are standard adjunction-naturality rewrites (auditor: acceptable, mild `erw`-fragility smell).
- Anonymous GMul/GOne instances — naming them would ease `#check`/diagnostics (auditor minor; would require a `\lean{}` correction if renamed — defer, merge-discipline keeps names stable).
- Blueprint-doctor (iter-006): unchanged extraction artifacts in DEFERRED chapters (`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` 2 phantom `covers` + 13 `\ref`; `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` 4; `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` 13) — all outside the active SNAP cone, resolve at merge-back. Active chapter clean.
